intro: An interactive adventure about a paladin torn between duty and desire.
description:
This is a classic tale of rescuing maidens from dangerous villains such as goblins, trolls, werewolves, harpies, and other dark creatures. You will encounter them across a variety of locations throughout the game world.

Your choices directly influence the story and the progression of the main character. Certain paladin abilities depend on your moral path and personal discipline. Multiple endings await, shaped by the decisions you make along the way.

Game features:

- Meaningful moral choices that affect both survival and story progression

- High-stakes decisions where every choice matters

- A familiar fantasy storyline with a humorous twist

- Play as an unconventional paladin hero

- Player decisions influence character development and the final outcome

- Rescue maidens and become their hero

- Japanese voice-over

- Dynamic battles and engaging QTE-based activities

- Optional caravan raids

- Beautifully animated scenes
